required_preferences.fact: Visits her grandmother solo or with family members as needed—comfortable making trips without her sister to ensure more consistent support during recovery

supersedes.fact: Visits her grandmother with her sister when in Milwaukee—never goes alone

required_preferences.fact: Switches to short at-home yoga sessions or stretches on weekdays—studio visits become occasional due to evening moot court practices and travel

supersedes.fact: Does yoga at a local studio every Wednesday and Saturday—won’t substitute with at-home sessions

required_preferences.fact: Uses guided meditation and ambient audio relaxation apps controlled by voice command in place of yoga or physical de-stress routines while hand mobility is restricted
Attends live theater performances in Chicago monthly—never streams shows at home
Keeps her phone on do-not-disturb mode during study blocks—never takes unscheduled calls
Schedules short video calls with her fiancé during his business trips to maintain connection—prefers frequent brief check-ins over long weekly conversations

persona: A law student specializing in intellectual property law
